trivia_bullets.text: Green Sorcery common (MKM, no. 154, February 9, 2024). Card name is a serpent-bite pun layered over crime-fighting theme.
Collect Evidence 6 reduces cost by {2}, potentially making a {3}{G} fight spell cost {1}{G} — among the cheapest fight effects when evidence is active.
sources: flipsidegaming.com: A Limited Guide to MKM

trivia_bullets.text: Flipside Gaming Limited review: 'casting Bite Down on Crime for 4 mana isn't ideal, but also not the worst'; cautions against combat-instant blow-out timing. Rated as an important Limited player when evidence-discounted.
sources: flipsidegaming.com: A Limited Guide to MKM

trivia_bullets.text: No flavor text on this card; art carries the full thematic load (serpent coiling at a crime scene).

related_cards.name: Forensic Researcher
related_cards.note: taps to Collect Evidence; fuels Bite Down discount

related_cards.note: fills graveyard with evidence fodder for Collect Evidence
